rulings.Case Title: JAMES FAHEY VS. SELECT PORTFOLIO SERVICING, INC.
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Defendant Select Portfolio Servicing, Inc.S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Summary Judgment Or, In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 31, 2019 line 1. DEFENDANT SELECT PORTFOLIO SERVICING, INC. MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Defendant Select Portfolio Servicing, Inc.S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Summary Judgment Or, In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities is continued to August 19, 2019. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFRL 2.7B and provide courtesy copies of the moving papers and reply to department 501 no later than August 1, 2019 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing from. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: ALICE GRIFFITH PHASE 2 LP VS. JOHN DOE ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 31, 2019 line 3. DEFENDANT SEFO SAGOTE, PAMATA SEVA'AETASI MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is DENIED. Complaint is properly verified per CCP 446. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: ALICE GRIFFITH PHASE 2 LP VS. JOHN DOE ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 31, 2019 line 3. DEFENDANT SEFO SAGOTE, PAMATA SEVA'AETASI DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained in part and overruled in part. Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to address the allegation in paragraph 8 regarding the dates of defendant "remained in possession." If currently alleged date is a typographical error, Plaintiff should so allege. Demurrer is otherwise overruled. = (501/CFH)
